auto_builder_gpt.purpose: Build and optionally relay approved AUTO BUILDER packets to the configured router. Defaults to dry run.

codex_autonomous.purpose: Validate local/repo bridge readiness and emit a Codex execution receipt.

gpt_runtime.purpose: Probe the Vercel runtime bridge routes when a preview/base URL is provided. Defaults to local dry run.

bridge_enablement.purpose: Verify all bridge files, routes, package scripts, and required governance gates are present.

auto_builder_relay.purpose: Relay a packet file to AUTO_BUILDER_ROUTER_URL only when AUTO_BRIDGE_EXECUTE=1.

n8n_ingress.purpose: Accept draft-only n8n bridge packets and write receipts when Supabase receipt storage is configured.

n8n_dispatch.purpose: Expose bridge route/capability status for n8n or external orchestrators.

supabase_queue_worker.purpose: Process already approved Supabase bridge queue rows through the AUTO BUILDER router.
